creator: dereks@lifeofadishwasher.com
text:
262940 has been updated.

https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/?id=d63665f7cd9c99880704a3c5bc221829cb009744

If you revert the previous patch moving the .h files and rebuild with net/xmlrpc-c installed while building net/pecl-xmlrpc should not fail.

If you can confirm we can close this bug.
